context: Verify that the agent selects the conference document type, uses verbose mode, and correctly handles the iterative refinement workflow.

checklist.name: --doc-type conference applied
checklist.description: The agent uses --doc-type conference (threshold 8.0/10), not the default or journal threshold.

checklist.name: Verbose mode enabled
checklist.description: The agent passes the -v flag to show generation and review steps as requested.

checklist.name: Smart iteration explained
checklist.description: The agent explains that regeneration only occurs if quality is below threshold — not unconditionally.

checklist.name: Output file path reported
checklist.description: The agent reports the path to the generated diagram in figures/.

checklist.name: Diagram scientifically described
checklist.description: The prompt passed to the generator includes encoder-decoder architecture with multi-head attention layers.
